blocks.text: was still there an hour later. She didn't mention it in the morning.

blocks.content: 9:43pm. The light in the upstairs window went dark.
9:51pm. A shape moved past the window on the far end of the house. Fast. Low.
10:30pm. The shape didn't come back through the window.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Upstairs. A shape past the window. Fast.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Julian, it's almost eleven. Somebody probably went to get water.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: They didn't come back through it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Because they went back to bed through the door.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: People sleep with the lights off. Julian. You need to stop.
The window stayed dark. I went inside.

blocks.prompt: That shape at the window. What do you think it was?

options.label: Someone going out. Not coming back in the same way.
A shadow. A trick of the light at night.
He doesn't know. But he won't forget it.
